title: Setting up the programming environment
description:
Setting up the programming environment

Setting up the programming environment

The programming environment has several preference settings for the program editor, fonts and colors, the jog screen, and the operator window.

Select Preferences: Project tab from the Setup menu to set project preferences.

Select Preferences: Editor tab from the Setup menu to set editor preferences.

Select Preferences: Operator Window tab from the Setup menu to set operator window preferences.

Select Preferences: Jogging tab from the Setup menu to set Jog and Teach preferences.
